description: Clarifications and non-normative corrections to SOA-Harness v1.0. Per §19.2, errata MUST NOT change any MUST's meaning — they are clarifications only. Binding errata reshape MUSTs only via a §19.4 minor/major bump.

errata.subject: Consolidation env-hook loopback guard
errata.body: `RUNNER_CONSOLIDATION_TICK_MS` and `RUNNER_CONSOLIDATION_ELAPSED_MS` are test-only hooks. Runners MUST refuse startup when either is set and the listener binds to a non-loopback interface. No change to the consolidation trigger algorithm itself.

errata.subject: Synthetic cache-hit env hook
errata.body: `RUNNER_SYNTHETIC_CACHE_HIT=<n>` stamps both `prompt_tokens_cached` and `completion_tokens_cached` by <n> on each decision for test-only validation of §13.3 cache accounting. Subject to the same loopback-only guard as §8.4.1 hooks. Production Runners with this env var set on a non-loopback listener MUST refuse startup.

errata.subject: Optional billing_tag in audit records
errata.body: When a session carries a billing_tag at bootstrap, that tag MUST appear in each audit record's hash-chained body. When the session omits billing_tag, the key MUST be absent from the record (not an empty string placeholder). This preserves byte-identity of the hash chain across tag-absent and tag-absent-historically sessions.

errata.subject: Memory sharing_policy canonical key
errata.body: The Agent Card field at `memory.sharing_policy` is canonical. Earlier pre-1.0 drafts referred to this as `memory.default_sharing_scope`; Runners MUST accept `sharing_policy` as the primary key and MAY accept `default_sharing_scope` for backward compatibility within the §19.4 two-minor window.
